brand.name: Concrete Form
brand.description: A field-ops mobile-first web app for concrete/ICF contractors on jobsites. Designed for foremen and crews wearing gloves.
brand.emotional_tone: Utilitarian, authoritative, clear, precise, rugged but modern.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first, dense but legible. Large tap targets are absolutely critical for gloved use.
spacing_and_layout.tap_targets: Minimum 48px height for all interactive elements (h-12, h-14, or h-16).
spacing_and_layout.corners: Sharp edges. Use rounded-none or maximum rounded-sm (2px) for a rugged, technical feel.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Use full width on mobile, max-w-md or max-w-3xl on larger screens to keep form inputs accessible.
spacing_and_layout.cards: border border-zinc-200 bg-white p-4 or p-6 shadow-sm. No soft blurry shadows. If using shadow, use a crisp drop shadow.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6A00] text-white hover:bg-[#E65C00] h-14 px-6 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-900 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 h-14 px-6 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
buttons.outline: border-2 border-zinc-200 bg-transparent text-zinc-900 hover:border-zinc-900 h-14 px-6 font-bold uppercase tracking-wide flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
buttons.ghost: text-zinc-600 hover:text-zinc-900 hover:bg-zinc-100 h-14 px-6 font-bold flex items-center justify-center transition-colors

inputs.default: h-14 w-full border-2 border-zinc-200 bg-white px-4 text-base font-medium focus:border-[#FF6A00] focus:ring-0 transition-colors

tabs.list: flex w-full overflow-x-auto border-b-2 border-zinc-200 no-scrollbar
tabs.trigger: h-14 px-6 font-bold text-zinc-500 whitespace-nowrap data-[state=active]:text-[#FF6A00] data-[state=active]:border-b-2 data-[state=active]:border-[#FF6A00] -mb-[2px]

bottom_nav.container: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-white border-t border-zinc-200 flex justify-around items-center z-50 pb-safe
bottom_nav.item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full text-zinc-500 data-[active=true]:text-[#FF6A00]

iconography.style: stroke-width 2.5 or 3 for better visibility on construction sites. Sharp, clear icons.

image_urls.description: building under construction with crane (backgrounds, hero sections)
person pouring/working with concrete (onboarding, feature highlights)
detailed view of gloved hands of a worker (login, authentic field context)
construction worker with helmet and gloves (user profile, dashboard headers)
blueprint of building (calculator backgrounds, auth screens)

accessibility_and_interactions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a hybrid_fullstack app tailored for mobile-first rendering. Ensure layout wrappers (like max-w-md mx-auto) are used to simulate mobile views on desktop if necessary, or build it completely responsive.
Ensure all tap targets (buttons, inputs, dropdown items) have a minimum height of 48px (h-12) to accommodate gloved users. Preferred size is h-14 (56px).
Use strict Swiss styling: white backgrounds, thick black borders where needed, sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm), and the safety-orange accent color (#FF6A00).
Use monospace font for all numeric outputs, measurements, and calculation results.
Do NOT use soft gradients or glassmorphism. Use flat colors and solid borders.
For the UI, avoid card roundness. Use sharp corners.
Integrate the provided real-world construction images instead of generic tech placeholders.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for icons. Make them slightly bolder if possible.
Ensure Shadcn UI components are customized to match this rigid, boxy, high-contrast style by overriding default border-radius and heights.
